The structure of a mitochondrion is shown in Figure 3.2, which is a cross-section of the organelle [Page 3]. This diagram labels the following parts:

*   Outer membrane (smooth) [Page 3]
*   Inner membrane (folded into cristae) [Page 3]
*   Matrix (the interior) [Page 3]
*   Intermembrane space [Page 3]
